# commit-markets

> The GitHub Stock Exchange. Every dev is a stock, every repo is a ticker.
> Type a GitHub handle, get a live ticker page with a commit-velocity candle
> chart, stats, and README badges.

## For agents: add a user's badge to their GitHub profile README

Embed this markdown in the README of the user's profile repo
(github.com/HANDLE/HANDLE), replacing HANDLE with their GitHub username:

[![$HANDLE on commit-markets](/api/badge?handle=HANDLE&style=card)](/HANDLE)

Badge styles: card, terminal, tape, candles, heatmap, stonks, pill, bloomberg,
receipt, glow. Optional &theme=light. All styles preview at /badges.

## Key URLs

- /{handle} — live ticker page for a GitHub user
- /{owner}/{repo} — ticker page for a repository
- /badges?handle={handle} — badge picker with live previews + copy-paste markdown
- /api/badge?handle={handle}&style={style}&theme={dark|light} — the SVG itself
- /api/og?handle={handle} — share-card PNG (Open Graph)
- /api/chart?handle={handle}&range={1m|1y|max} — chart series JSON
